feed.title: sakkamade
feed.subtitle: through life with yuri in heart

entry.title: Section 4. Vixen in white Kimono.
entry.summary: The brain of Fuyuka have suspended thinking. Apparently amount of intelligence which she may accept as human was past tolerable. “Well, err—…?” The maiden who have bowed politely a moment ago, witness lady motionless, spoke to her in a bashful voice. However, as no reaction have befall her all the same, she have grown anxious, and, chon,1 pinched the clothes of miko by the side. [Chon] - touch softly; back

entry.title: Section 3. Mysterious Mystery at the Shrine.

link.title: Section 3. Mysterious Mystery at the Shrine.

entry.summary: Fuyuka was ready to fall to her knees in frustration. She could not have expected to be invited to an uninhabited shrine. “Is this what they call yukai-han…?”1 The scenery is resplendent in its architecture, however, in spite of the holiday, say nothing of worshippers and tourists, not even Shinto priests or other shrine workers might be spotted. This fact had plainly apprised her that something as an exorcism is not practised thereat. [Yukai-han] - criminal who takes delight in people’s reaction to their crimes; back

entry.title: Section 2. For the Grief of being Rejected.

link.title: Section 2. For the Grief of being Rejected.

entry.summary: “I’m sorry. I enjoyed a time with you, Fuyuka, but still I have a family of my own.” “…Ha?”

entry.title: Section 1. Working Member of Society and Vixen.

link.title: Section 1. Working Member of Society and Vixen.

entry.summary: This is my new series. I hope you enjoy! “Nice to meet you. I am Ohana.”1 “…Yes?” “I’ve come here as your bride, my Lady. And although I may be inexperienced, I look forward to spend with you many a years to come.” [Hana] - flower; but preceding [o] gives the word formal ambience—something akin the flower, but simultaneously it gives the word slight cuteness and character; the girl use such [o] in her vocabulary likewise; back

entry.title: Part 3. Witch of Darkness. ①
entry.summary: “Kya—.” “Waah—.” People raised a scream. Lights in the mall went out, turning it total darkness. Some people held their heads and squatted down on the spot. Some began to run in uncertainty. Some amplified their voices in attempt to calm the situation. Some were dazed and stay stock still, unable to do anything. The district was in state of chaos at an abrupt event.

entry.title: Part 2. Forgotten Witch. ⑤
entry.summary: “Enjoyed lavish breakfast, readied myself to leave for university.” Presently, such were happenings of my every morning to which I was looking forward each time. With that in mind, day after day the joy of being alive was intensifying. The cuisine of Honda-san might even eclipse a chef’s, thought I, making a sandwich; so much so that without any joke I wanted to ask her, “Please prepare a miso soup for me every morning.” Otherwise, “May you become my maid.”

entry.title: Part 2. Forgotten Witch. ④
entry.summary: “Pa, pardon the intrusion.” Where is “She”—the one who menaced me upon this very morning? Crossing the threshold of my house, she have passed into a meek borrowed cat.1 I invited her in, as she have carefully arranged her footwear. [Borrowed cat] - Japanese idiom of someone who is suddenly quiet and meek; back

entry.title: Part 2. Forgotten Witch. ③
entry.summary: I asked her tearful self: “What are you doing out here?” “It has nothing to do with you.” By no means it has not. Without her consent, I bring myself down a swing which was adjacent to hers. She sent a glance at me, however did no flee.

entry.title: Part 2. Forgotten Witch. ②
entry.summary: “It was a terrible day.” The girl, who used to be Maejima-san—Rino Honda-san—learned that I am a witch. Furthermore, as was exposed, Honda-san is also a witch, and, appearing to be a rival of mine from the days of middle school, she issued me a challenge. Upon being challenged I have lost by default. It should have been an excessively reckless to have a flight contest with me who lacked a magical force.

entry.title: Part 2. Forgotten Witch. ①
entry.summary: Late at the night enclosed by the park, I was seated upon a swing alone, whereas staring downwards. “Impossible, impossible.” My plan was proceeding well. It was flawless.
